scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: The NYU Center brings together researchers tapping into AI to develop intelligent machines that can sense, navigate, and act autonomously in complex real-world environments, from operating rooms to disaster zones

claims.claim: The NYU Center brings together researchers tapping into AI to develop intelligent machines that can sense, navigate, and act autonomously in complex real-world environments, from operating rooms to disaster zones
